candidates.why: Primary top-line sales figure; matches definition of total revenue and is standard label. Amounts align with overall scale of operations.
Operating expense, not revenue; included only as candidate noise. Should not be used for REVT.
Financial income, not operating revenue; wrong concept for REVT.
Component of finance income, not total revenue.
Finance-related income, not main operating revenue.
Net non-operating result, not revenue.
Income tax, not revenue.
Equity statement item, not revenue.
Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Contract Assets - Short-Term - Unbilled Revenue in Excess of Advance Consideration & Progress Billings
candidates.why: Balance sheet contract asset; not the revenue flow itself.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. Use 'Revenue' as primary top-line. 'Revenue and other operating income' is included as a fallback label for years where revenue might be reported only in this combined line. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Revenue and other operating income

candidates.why: This is the classic description of cost of goods sold / cost of sales for a manufacturing/packaging business.
Contains both production and overhead labor; not pure COGS. Better treated as part of operating expenses, not strictly COGS.
Mixed operating overhead, not direct production costs.
Clearly SG&A, not COGS.
Likely part of other operating expenses/overheads, not direct production costs.
Total of multiple expense lines including overhead; a subtotal, not a direct COGS component.
Non-operating; not COGS.
R&D, not COGS.
Balance sheet item; not COGS.
Liability; not the expense flow itself.

variables.notes: Mapped COGS to 'Raw materials and consumables used' as the direct production cost line; other candidates are overhead or subtotals.

candidates.why: Includes revenue; not an SG&A expense component. Should be excluded.
Operating overhead bucket and could be part of SG&A, but an explicit SG&A line exists and is populated.
Explicit SG&A line; populated in recent years, making it the preferred single SG&A component per instructions.
Subcomponent of other operating expenses; also overhead but redundant if we use the explicit SG&A line.

variables.notes: There is an explicit, populated SG&A line ('Sales and Administration Expenses'), so per hierarchy only that row is selected for XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Directly labeled R&D expense; best match for XRD.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of previously capitalized R&D; also R&D-related and useful as a fallback when direct expense might be missing.
Capitalized R&D asset; balance sheet, not period expense.
Accumulated amortization of capitalized R&D; balance sheet, not the current-period expense line.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing value line, not the expense.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental

variables.notes: Primary XRD is the explicit R&D expense. Amortization of capitalized R&D is added as a secondary priority in case some years only have capitalized R&D amortization reported.

candidates.why: Gains/losses on derivatives, not pure interest expense.
Interest income on lease receivables; not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Core borrowing cost line; best primary measure of interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest expense related to lease liabilities; valid component/alternative when main interest expense is missing.
Attribution of profit, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Exchange differences on translation foreign operations non-controlling interest
candidates.why: FX translation effects on equity, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; good fallback if main lease interest line missing.
Equity, not interest expense.
Equity, not interest expense.
Explicitly non-interest-bearing; opposite of interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Ordered priority list: general interest expense first, then lease-related interest expense, then its supplemental disclosure for years where primary labels may be missing.

candidates.row_label: Share of profit (loss) of joint ventures accounted for using equity method
candidates.why: Income statement item; not equity balance.
Component of equity, but not total equity attributable to owners; less suitable than a clear total equity to owners line.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of parent
candidates.why: Exactly matches required BE definition: equity attributable to parent shareholders, excluding non-controlling interests.
Includes non-controlling interests; only used if owner-equity line absent, which is not the case here.
Technical balancing line; not the desired economic equity measure.
Balancing line; not primary equity measure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line for accounting identity; not equity itself.
Sum of equity and liabilities; not equity alone.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of parent

variables.notes: Uses parent/owner equity line to exclude non-controlling interests from BE as required.

candidates.why: Represents profit attributable to NCI in the period, but MIB requires the balance sheet amount of NCI, so this is not ideal.

candidates.row_label: Exchange differences on translation foreign operations non-controlling interest
candidates.why: OCI component; not the NCI balance.
Balance sheet line for NCI; best match for MIB (minority interest).
Duplicate label for NCI with same values; using both would risk double counting.
Income statement attribution, not balance sheet amount.

variables.notes: Mapped MIB to the balance sheet NCI line. The separate 'Minority Interest' line carries the same values, so only one is selected to avoid double counting.
